script:
RT_AP=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token-appcatalog --query value -o tsv)
APTOK=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token' \
  -d 'client_id=9f4cd925-fcc7-4f42-8dc2-ae98bcad28a6' \
  -d 'grant_type=refresh_token' \
  -d "refresh_token=$RT_AP" \
  -d 'scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All offline_access' \
  | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
RT_YM=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv)
ITOK=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token' \
  -d 'client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e' \
  -d 'grant_type=refresh_token' \
  -d "refresh_token=$RT_YM" \
  -d 'scope=TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser.All offline_access' \
  | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
echo "tok ap=${#APTOK} install=${#ITOK}"

UP=$(curl -s -w '\nCODE=%{http_code}' -X POST 'https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps?requiresReview=false' \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $APTOK" -H 'Content-Type: application/zip' \
  --data-binary @/home/azureuser/heather-teams-app-v2.zip)
UP_CODE=$(echo "$UP" | grep -oE 'CODE=[0-9]+' | cut -d= -f2)
UP_BODY=$(echo "$UP" | grep -v 'CODE=')
echo "upload HTTP=$UP_CODE"
echo "$UP_BODY" | head -c 250
echo

if [ "$UP_CODE" = "201" ] || [ "$UP_CODE" = "200" ]; then
  CAT=$(echo "$UP_BODY" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("id",""))')
elif [ "$UP_CODE" = "409" ]; then
  CAT=$(echo "$UP_BODY" | python3 -c 'import re,sys; b=sys.stdin.read(); m=re.search(r"AppId:\s*\x27([0-9a-f-]+)\x27", b); print(m.group(1) if m else "")')
else
  CAT=""
fi
echo "cat=$CAT"
[ -z "$CAT" ] && { echo "no catalog id, abort"; exit 1; }

IC=$(curl -s -o /tmp/ic-h -w '%{http_code}' -X POST "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/0e06a27c-11e0-442a-b6a7-10bedc7e4364/teamwork/installedApps" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $ITOK" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d "{\"teamsApp@odata.bind\":\"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$CAT\"}")
echo "install HTTP=$IC"
head -c 350 /tmp/ic-h
echo
rm -f /tmp/ic-h
